meaning: n.[药]三氟溴氯乙烷,氟烷(一种麻醉药)
examples: The inheritance of the halothane gene was shown to be in agreement with Mendel's law of segregation.
What anesthesia do you want to use - Isoflurane, Halothane...?
Objective To compare ketamine and halothane anesthesia for children undergoing little operation.
